scripts.dev: concurrently -n gw,auth,task,web -c cyan,blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w apps/gateway" "npm run dev -w apps/auth-service" "npm run dev -w apps/task-service" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/gateway && npm run build -w apps/auth-service && npm run build -w apps/task-service && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w apps/gateway && npm run typecheck -w apps/auth-service && npm run typecheck -w apps/task-service && npm run typecheck -w apps/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w apps/auth-service && npm run test -w apps/task-service
